title: Bed Bug Treatment New Brunswick, NJ | $1,200 – $3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in New Brunswick, NJ. Serving Rutgers campus, downtown, and residential areas. Fast, effective extermination. $1,200 – $3,500. Call today!
intro: New Brunswick residents and Rutgers students deserve a bed bug-free environment, whether in off-campus housing, historic downtown apartments, or family homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout New Brunswick and surrounding Middlesex County areas. Our experienced technicians use proven heat treatment and chemical methods to eliminate bed bugs completely.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of expertise to New Brunswick, combining advanced treatment technology with personalized service tailored to your property's needs. We understand the unique challenges of treating bed bugs in everything from college apartment complexes near Rutgers to Victorian homes in the historic district, and we guarantee results with follow-up inspections included.
localContext: New Brunswick's diverse housing stock—from high-density student apartments along George Street to multi-family homes near Joyce Kilmer Avenue—requires specialized bed bug solutions. We're familiar with the area's mix of historic buildings downtown and modern residential developments, ensuring effective treatment regardless of your property type.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in New Brunswick typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. Multi-unit buildings and larger homes may require more extensive treatment, while single rooms or small apartments fall on the lower end of the price range.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in New Brunswick take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. Heat treatment provides same-day results, while chemical treatments typically require a follow-up visit within 2-3 weeks. We work around your schedule to minimize disruption, which is especially important for students and busy families.

faqs.question: Do you treat bed bugs in Rutgers off-campus housing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we frequently treat bed bugs in off-campus student housing throughout New Brunswick, including apartments near Rutgers campus. We understand the urgency for students and work quickly to eliminate infestations. We also coordinate with landlords and property managers to ensure thorough treatment and can provide documentation for housing offices if needed.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in New Brunswick homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Heat treatment is completely chemical-free, while our targeted chemical applications use products specifically designed for residential use. We provide clear preparation and re-entry instructions to ensure everyone's safety, and our technicians are licensed and trained in safe application methods.
